Package models

Class Product

java.lang.Object
models.Product
All Implemented Interfaces:
structuralAdapterPattern.Discountable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Clothing, Electronics, Grocery
public abstract class Product extends Object implements structuralAdapterPattern.Discountable
The Product class represents a generic product in the system.

This class implements the Discountable interface and serves as the base class for different types of products, such as electronics, clothing, and groceries. It includes information about the product, including its name, price, discount, reviews, and a list of subscribed observers.

  • Constructor Details

    • Product

      public Product(String name, double price)
      Initializes a new product with the specified name and price.

      The product is initialized with no discount and an empty reviews list. Observers are also initialized as an empty list.

      Parameters:
      name - The name of the product.
      price - The price of the product.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Retrieves the name of the product.
      Returns:
      The name of the product.

    • getPrice

      public double getPrice()
      Retrieves the price of the product.
      Returns:
      The price of the product.

    • getProductCategory

      public abstract String getProductCategory()
      Retrieves the category of the product.

      This method is abstract and must be implemented by subclasses to specify the product's category.

      Returns:
      The category of the product.

    • applyDiscount

      public void applyDiscount(double percentage)
      Applies a discount to the product.

      The discount is specified as a percentage, and it must be between 0 and 100. If the percentage is invalid, an IllegalArgumentException is thrown.

      Specified by:
      applyDiscount in interface structuralAdapterPattern.Discountable
      Parameters:
      percentage - The discount percentage to be applied to the product.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the percentage is less than 0 or greater than 100.

    • getDiscountedPrice

      public double getDiscountedPrice()
      Retrieves the discounted price of the product.

      The discounted price is calculated as the original price minus the discount percentage.

      Specified by:
      getDiscountedPrice in interface structuralAdapterPattern.Discountable
      Returns:
      The discounted price of the product.

    • displayInfo

      public String displayInfo()
      Displays the product details, including its category, original price, and discounted price (if applicable).

      If a discount is applied, both the original price and the discounted price are shown. Otherwise, only the original price is displayed.

      Returns:
      A formatted string containing the product's name, category, price, and discounted price (if applicable).

    • addReview

      public void addReview(ProductReview review)
      Adds a review to the product.

      This method adds the given ProductReview to the list of reviews and notifies all subscribed observers.

      Parameters:
      review - The review to be added to the product.

    • displayReviews

      public void displayReviews()
      Displays all reviews for the product.

      If no reviews are available, a message is displayed indicating that no reviews are available for the product.

    • addObserver

      public void addObserver(behavioralObserverPattern.User user)
      Adds a user as an observer to the product.

      Observers can be notified about updates regarding the product, such as changes in availability or reviews.

      Parameters:
      user - The user to be added as an observer.

    • notifyObservers

      protected void notifyObservers(String message)
      Notifies all subscribed observers about an update.

      This method sends a message to all users who are observing the product, notifying them of any updates.

      Parameters:
      message - The message to be sent to the observers.
